olympic_hockey: The United States and Canada played in the men's Olympic hockey final at the 2026 Milano Cortina Winter Olympics. The U.S. defeated Canada 2-1 in overtime on February 22, 2026, to win their first gold medal since 1980. Key players included Jack Hughes (USA) who scored the winning goal, and standout goaltenders Connor Hellebuyck (USA) and Jordan Binnington (CAN).
world_cup_98: France won the 1998 FIFA World Cup, defeating Brazil 3-0 in the final on July 12, 1998, at the Stade de France in Saint-Denis. This was France's first World Cup title, secured by two goals from Zinedine Zidane and one from Emmanuel Petit.
best_chess_player: Magnus Carlsen is widely recognized as the best chess player in the world, maintaining his position as the top-rated player for over a decade. A five-time World Champion and dominant force in classical, rapid, and blitz formats, he holds the highest peak rating in history (2882).
